chunks.text: [×](#) We recently upgraded the website! If you run into any issues, please [Contact Us](https://www.raps.org/connect-engage/about-raps/contact-us.html). Enjoy exploring the new site! [Skip to content](#contents) [![Regulatory Affairs Professionals Society Logo](https://www.raps.org/static/101e2bda-0c63-416f-9c947a6af340a61e/2026RAPS-50-H-Full-Color.webp)](https://www.raps.org) 1. You are here: 2. [Homepage](https://www.raps.org/) 3. [News & Insights Search](https://www.raps.org/resource-library-search.html) 4. Recon: FDA Places Hold on LogicBio Study; Pfizer Exits Glycomimetics Sickle Cell Disease Pact ![rf-fullcolor.png](https://www.raps.org/static/326100aa-a8a6-41c8-88b0edfd6bcc8eed/71105bac-1b8d-495b-8eef58dd76d1920e/rapsresourcebannerlogo_9b0b3184dc59d50e4e10531d04b5ac6c_4a7c7e45a350/rf-fullcolor.png) [Recon](https://www.raps.org/resource-library-search.html?information_type=recon) 11 February 2020 by Michael Mezher # Recon: FDA Places Hold on LogicBio Study; Pfizer Exits Glycomimetics Sickle Cell Disease Pact Welcome to Regulatory Reconnaissance, your daily regulatory news and intelligence briefing. **In Focus: US** * US biotechs fear the coronavirus outbreak will delay their China-based research ([STAT](https://www.statnews.com/2020/02/11/biotechs-fear-coronavirus-will-delay-china-based-research/)) ([Reuters](https://www.reuters.com/article/us-china-virus-vaccine-breakingviews/breakingviews-biotech-undergoes-the-ultimate-trial-by-epidemic-idUSKBN205094)) * FDA slaps a hold on LogicBio and its gene editing plans — shares tumble ([Endpoints](https://endpts.com/fda-slaps-a-hold-on-logicbio-and-its-gene-editing-plans-shares-tumble/)) ([Fierce](https://www.fiercebiotech.com/biotech/logicbio-rocked-by-fda-clinical-hold-genome-editing-trial)) * Merck walks away from KalVista, who turns their sights on HAE ([Endpoints](https://endpts.com/merck-walks-away-from-kalvista-who-turns-their-sights-on-hae/)) * Pfizer uncouples from GlycoMimetics and its failed sickle cell disease drug ([Endpoints](https://endpts.com/pfizer-uncouples-from-glycomimetics-and-its-failed-sickle-cell-disease-drug/)) * Exelixis bounces back with new prostate cancer data ([PMLive](http://www.pmlive.com/pharma_news/exelixis_bounces_back_with_new_prostate_cancer_data_1325052)) ([STAT](https://www.statnews.com/2020/02/10/new-combination-drug-data-exelixis-prostate-cancer/)) ([Endpoints](https://endpts.com/with-blockbuster-dreams-exelixis-is-looking-for-some-redemption-for-cabo-in-prostate-cancer-it-wont-be-easy/)) ([Press](https://www.businesswire.com/news/home/20200210005731/en/Exelixis-Announces-Encouraging-Results-Cabozantinib-Combination-Atezolizumab/?feedref=JjAwJuNHiystnCoBq_hl-WBlLQO14j4QZPTyX5CYOnwC4VjN53jumZRlnzhBoBxGrCOi9QzgjCezTS3Nw_X6kJUrpSBm-Hav1w-UkdSlG3ltkRSnqzf6ourQGu_UA28CzZCGORvG0LE20YOvo49uqw==)) * Novartis lung cancer drug gets priority US review ([Reuters](https://www.reuters.com/article/us-novartis-cancer/novartis-lung-cancer-drug-gets-priority-u-s-review-idUSKBN2050J9?feedType=RSS&feedName=healthNews)) ([Endpoints](https://endpts.com/novartis-nabs-priority-review-for-a-blockbuster-to-be-aimed-at-nsclc-niche-delighting-incyte-execs/)) * Elizabeth Holmes’ attorneys ask judge to throw out Theranos fraud case ([CNBC](https://www.cnbc.com/2020/02/10/elizabeth-holmes-attorneys-ask-judge-to-throw-out-theranos-fraud-case.html)) ([Business Insider](https://www.businessinsider.com/elizabeth-holmes-pushes-to-get-theranos-fraud-case-thrown-out-2020-2)) ([Law360](https://www.law360.com/lifesciences/articles/1242353/ex-theranos-ceo-says-bad-blood-tests-are-a-fact-of-life-)-$) * Priscilla Chan charts an ambitious, unglamorous course to fight disease. (Her husband is involved, too.) ([STAT](https://www.statnews.com/2020/02/11/priscilla-chan-charts-an-ambitious-unglamorous-course-to-fight-disease-her-husband-is-involved-too/)) * In Trump’s Budget, Big Health Care Cuts but Few Details ([NYTimes 1](https://www.nytimes.com/2020/02/10/upshot/health-care-trump-budget.html), [2](https://www.nytimes.com/2020/02/10/business/economy/trump-budget-explained-facts.html)) ([Alliance for a Stronger FDA](https://strengthenfda.org/2020/02/11/alliance-issues-analysis-of-presidents-fy-21-request-for-fda-funding/)) ([Politico](https://www.politico.com/newsletters/prescription-pulse/2020/02/11/white-house-takes-new-approach-to-drug-pricing-in-2021-budget-488294)) ([Focus](https://www.raps.org/news-and-articles/news-articles/2020/2/trumps-2021-budget-request-seeks-modest-funding-i)) * Pharma Pay-For-Delay Deals Called ‘Cost of Doing Business’ ([Bloomberg Law](https://news.bloomberglaw.com/pharma-and-life-sciences/pharma-pay-for-delay-settlements-cost-of-doing-business)) * Pharma Megadeals Pass First Checkup ([WSJ](https://www.wsj.com/articles/pharma-megadeals-pass-first-checkup-11581346234)) **In Focus: International** * Coronavirus death toll surges past 1,000 as fears grow for Chinese economy ([Reuters](https://www.reuters.com/article/us-china-health/coronavirus-death-toll-surges-past-1000-as-fears-grow-for-chinese-economy-idUSKBN20504Y?feedType=RSS&feedName=healthNews)) * Disease caused ([Financial Times](https://www.ft.com/content/feae3ea1-cbc4-4188-96bf-8de8d01257d3)) * Bayer, Nuvisan Create New Research Unit In Berlin ([Reuters](https://www.reuters.com/article/brief-bayer-nuvisan-create-new-research/brief-bayer-nuvisan-create-new-research-unit-in-berlin-idUSFWN2AA1RJ)) ([BioPharmaDive](https://www.biopharmadive.com/news/bayer-nuvisan-seeds-small-molecule-research-center/572114/)) ([Press](https://media.bayer.com/baynews/baynews.nsf/id/Bayer-and-Nuvisan-create-new-research-unit-in-Berlin)) * Sanofi and Regeneron's Libtayo approved on NHS Scotland for cutaneous squamous cell carcinoma ([Pharmafile](http://www.pharmafile.com/news/541291/sanofi-and-regenerons-libtayo-approved-nhs-scotland-cutaneous-squamous-cell-carcinoma)) * Mubadala to significantly increase investment in life sciences, medical technology ([Reuters](https://www.reuters.com/article/us-mubadala-inv-investment/mubadala-to-significantly-increase-investment-in-life-sciences-medical-technology-idUSKBN2050IZ?feedType=RSS&feedName=healthNews)) Sheet](https://pink.pharmaintelligence.informa.com/PS141641/China-Unlikely-To-Be-Included-In-US-FDAs-Project-Orbis-In-The-Near-Term)-$) * HHS Partners With Pharma On New Disaster Response Biotech
